{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = gate (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The darkness is a gate leading to a sacred land of opportunity.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“The darkness before you is a gate. It leads to a sacred land of opportunity, but for this opportunity, you must fight.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
